nasb.text: It was at this time that Moses was born; and he was lovely in the sight of God, and he was nurtured three months in his father’s home.

esv.text: At this time Moses was born; and he was beautiful in God’s sight. And he was brought up for three months in his father’s house,

cnv.text: 就在那時候，摩西出生了，他非常俊美，在父親的家中撫養了三個月。

ccb.text: 那时，摩西出生了，他长得俊美非凡。他的父母在家里偷偷地抚养了他三个月，

csbs.text: 就在那时候，摩西出生了。他在神的眼里十分俊美，在父亲家里被抚养了三个月。
